title: The Burly Boys Xxl
description: Dave The Bear and his troupe of skilled acrobats, hot male burlesque and sexy men with their butts out are back, bigger, bolder and burlierer! Experience a campier version of Magic Mike with dazzling, all-male burlesque that combines charm, charisma, and cheeky humour. With a cast of incredible performers, it promises to be a thrilling evening of daring dance, captivating acrobats, and unforgettable performances. Don't miss this one-of-a-kind spectacle!

venue.name: Sabai Pavilion
venue.address: Preston Park, Preston Road, East Sussex
